---
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

### Welcome

Hi, I am **Carina Peh** and welcome to my course portfolio for **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications**.

### Latest Updates

### Hands-on Exercise 2 — Beyond ggplot2 Fundamentals

Explored ggplot2 extensions including ggrepel, ggthemes, hrbrthemes and patchwork.

[Read more →](Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex02.qmd)

### Hands-on Exercise 1 — A Layered Grammar of Graphics

Introduction to ggplot2 and building statistical charts in R.

[Read more →](Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex01.qmd)
